prompt:
A chemical factory operates with two mixing tanks. Tank A contains 150 liters of a 20% sulfuric acid solution. Tank B contains 250 liters of a 30% sulfuric acid solution.

First, 40% of the entire contents of Tank A are carefully transferred into Tank B.
Following this, 50 liters of pure water are added to Tank B.

What is the final percentage concentration of sulfuric acid in Tank B? Provide your answer rounded to two decimal places.
